description: Engineering retrospective from git history — velocity, test ratio, focus score, commit patterns. Use when: "/retro", "retro on last N days", "how productive was this sprint", "analyze my commit history", "work patterns", "session analysis", "回顧", "分析工作模式", "這週做了什麼". Not for: viewing specific commit diffs, comparison audits, or debugging test coverage drops.

results.query: analyze my commit history for the last 30 days. I want the hourly distribution chart, session detection, and ship of the week.
回顧一下最近的工作模式 — 哪些時段最有生產力？test coverage 有進步嗎？
what should I work on next? scan all the plans and backlog items.
how productive was this sprint? analyze the git history for the past 7 days — commit patterns, session lengths, hotspot files
compare our old CRM implementation with the new Vue 3 version — check field completeness and feature parity
what changed in the last 5 commits? show me the diff summary
give me a retro on the last 2 weeks — I want to see velocity, test ratio, focus score, and whether we're improving compared to last month
debug why the test coverage dropped from 22% to 8% — which test files were deleted or broken?
review the code quality of my recent changes — look for security issues and missing error handling
